Feature_Name: Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover UE Context Setup Procedure
Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for LTM.
Feature_Objectives: To create a UE context and setup one or more data bearers in the candidate gNB-DU for subsequent LTM.
To provide the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell from the candidate gNB-DU to the gNB-CU.
Feature_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: 1. The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

2. If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.

Code_Instructions.description: Data structure defining the format and content of the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message. This is a fundamental building block for constructing and parsing the request message sent from gNB-CU to gNB-DU.
Data structure defining the format and content of the F1AP UE Context Setup Response message. This is essential for parsing the response received by the gNB-CU from the gNB-DU.

A utility function within the RRC layer of the gNB that is responsible for generating and populating the necessary information elements for the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message. This function prepares the RRC-specific content before it's passed to the F1AP layer for encoding and transmission.

This function likely serves as an interface or helper for handling the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message from the RRC layer towards the F1AP protocol stack. It could be involved in encoding the message or preparing it for transmission over the F1 interface.

This function likely serves as an interface or helper for processing the F1AP UE Context Setup Response message received from the F1AP protocol stack and passing its decoded contents to the RRC layer for further handling. It's crucial for parsing the incoming response.
